decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 254/254 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
